{
  "claims": [
    "California has the fourth highest rate of homelessness in the nation.",
    "California has the highest rate of unsheltered homelessness in the nation.",
    "California's population experiencing homelessness reached a record 181,399 individuals in 2023.",
    "67 percent of individuals experiencing homelessness in California are unsheltered.",
    "SB 1395 will encourage the development of interim housing by clarifying that relocatable, non-congregate interim housing is eligible for streamlined zoning.",
    "SB 1395 aims to reduce construction time and costs for interim housing.",
    "SB 1395 empowers local governments by expediting approvals for interim housing.",
    "SB 1395 extends the sunset for existing streamlining authorities beyond 2026.",
    "Interim housing is a key part of the response to homelessness in California.",
